description_long: This sculpture depicts a young male figure dressed in a scout uniform, complete with a neckerchief, shorts, and knee-high socks. The figure stands upright on a rectangular plinth, holding a hat in his left hand and resting his right hand on his hip. The facial features are finely detailed, conveying a sense of youthful confidence and attentiveness. The uniform includes a buttoned shirt with pockets and a sash, and the shoes are robust, suggesting readiness for outdoor activity. The entire sculpture has a uniform, weathered metallic finish, likely bronze or a similar alloy, giving it a dignified and timeless appearance. The base is simple and unadorned, serving to elevate and stabilize the figure.
description: A detailed bronze sculpture of a young scout standing confidently on a rectangular plinth, holding a hat and dressed in a traditional scout uniform.
description_view_0: Front view showing the scout's face, uniform details, and hat held in the left hand.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the hat, and the arm positions.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the uniform, neckerchief, and the figure's stance.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the scout's right arm on his hip and the side of the hat.
attribute_location_context: No specific environmental context is visible; the sculpture appears isolated on a plain background.
